## Summary

<!-- What changed, and why? -->

## Operational Impact

<!-- Call out routing, packaging, upgrade, release, or security impact. Use "None" if there is none. -->

## Validation

<!-- List exact commands run, or explain what could not be run. -->

- [ ] `make fmt-check`
- [ ] `make vet`
- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `make build`

## Checklist

- [ ] Documentation is updated or not needed.
- [ ] Packaging, container, and service behavior are aligned if install/runtime paths changed.
- [ ] Release impact is clear from the PR title, labels, and description.
- [ ] Security-sensitive workflow or permission changes are justified.
- [ ] `main` remains release-candidate-ready after merge.
